# CWE-408 vulnerable: Incorrect Behavior Order: Early Amplification (positive, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-408-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

func PullTenantArchive(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) error {
	tenant := r.URL.Query().Get("tenant")
	rows, err := db.Query("SELECT * FROM orders WHERE tenant_id = ?", tenant)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	defer rows.Close()
	auth := r.Header.Get("Authorization")
	if auth == "" {
		http.Error(w, "auth required", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return http.ErrNotSupported
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	return nil
}
